mapper.sql: id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, status, created_at, published_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_events ( aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, status ) VALUES ( #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, #{payload}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM outbox_events WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT #{limit}
